# Acme Corp — Client Status Update — 2026-06-10

## Overall health
Yellow. Delivery is progressing but there are two open risks.

## Current team
- Alice Chen (lead ML engineer, 100% allocated)
- Bob Martinez (data engineer, 80% allocated)

## Risks
1. **Data pipeline delays** — The client data team is taking 3–5 days to respond to data quality questions. This is blocking the feature store build. Risk of escalation if not resolved by June 14.
2. **Stakeholder misalignment** — The client sponsor and the technical lead have different expectations about the scope of Phase 2. Decision needed on whether to include real-time inference in the initial delivery.

## Client sentiment
The executive sponsor is happy with the weekly updates but the technical lead is frustrated with the pace of the data pipeline work. We should address this proactively.

## Next milestone
Feature store v1 by June 20. This is a contractual milestone.

## Unresolved decisions
- Real-time inference: in or out of Phase 1?
- Who owns data quality remediation — client or our team?

## Action items
- Waiting on client to confirm data team availability for a working session
- Need to loop in AE on the scope decision before next standup
